NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

REPLY IN SUPPORT OF MTN TO STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING OUTCOME OF ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT KEYES EUROPEAN LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA KEYES EUROPEAN CHASE AUTO FINANCE CORPORATION A CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS KEYES EUROPEAN LLC AND CHASE AUTO FINANCE CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING OUTCOME OF ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. CLRA CLAIMS FOR DAMAGES, AS CONTRASTED WITH INJUNCTIVE RELIEF, ARE SUBJECT TO ARBITRATION. BROUGHTON VS. CIGNA HEALTHPLANS (1999) 21 CAL. 4TH 1066. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Melanie Joo of Venable, LLP, 310-229-9900, appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS KEYES EUROPEAN LLC and CHASE AUTO FINANCE CORPORATION'S Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Arbitration is granted. CLRA claims for damages, as contrasted with injunctive relief, are subject to arbitration. Broughton vs. CIGNA Healthplans (1999) 21 Cal. 4th 1066. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
